overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a bustling outdoor market built from shipping containers and makeshift stalls. The player character moves from ground level food stalls through narrow alleys, ascends to an upper walkway past a pharmacy, and descends back to the market before entering a building through a beaded curtain entrance. The environment features dramatic lighting with strong sunlight contrasting against neon signs and atmospheric steam effects.

agents.ego_description: walking past a ramen food stall with green bar stools, moving through a narrow steamy alleyway

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food stall counter preparing food
pedestrian with purple hair standing near the scaffolding wall

green industrial wall with metal scaffolding and pipes
atmospheric steam effects rising from vents and food preparation areas

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a street food stall with green stools and steam rising from the counter. The camera moves forward through a narrow alleyway flanked by industrial scaffolding walls, with atmospheric steam creating a hazy effect. A vendor works at the stall while a pedestrian stands near the wall.

events.description: emerging from shaded alley into area with direct sunlight streaming through overhead structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the main market thoroughfare with shipping containers and stalls on both sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking toward the camera
vendor standing at a market stall under the overhead canopy

stacked colorful shipping containers converted into market stalls and shops
metal staircase leading to upper level walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a sunlit market street lined with shipping container structures and overhead metal walkways. The camera moves through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing vendors and shoppers. Metal stairs leading upward become visible on the left as the segment progresses.

events.description: ascending metal stairs from ground level to upper walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs to an upper level walkway, passing by a pharmacy and advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in red and yellow outfit standing near the railing looking out

entered.detail: metal grate flooring on the upper walkway allowing view of level below
black and white striped fabric canopy overhead
illuminated cyan neon sign reading PHARMACEUTICALS
metal safety railing along the edge of the upper walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends metal stairs to an upper walkway featuring grate flooring and a striped canopy overhead. A prominent cyan pharmaceuticals neon sign marks a shop on the right, while advertisements line the walls. The perspective shifts to overlook the lower market level through the metal grating.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level container market with neon signage

events.description: descending from upper walkway back to ground level market area

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and walking through the ground level market past container shops and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray coat and red hat walking ahead
person in purple outfit leaning against the orange container wall

entered.detail: large orange shipping container structure with corrugated metal walls
pink neon sign reading WATSON WHORE on the container wall
blue metal shipping container door with locking mechanism

segments.scene_description: The camera descends back to ground level into a bustling market area dominated by an orange shipping container building with a prominent pink neon sign. Pedestrians move through the narrow passage between blue and orange container structures, with various market stalls visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: market entrance with beaded curtain doorway

events.description: approaching and entering a building through a hanging beaded curtain entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing through a beaded curtain entrance into an interior space

entered.detail: doorway covered with hanging green circular plastic or metallic beads
hanging green reflective circular discs forming a curtain
dark interior entrance beyond the beaded curtain

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to the food stall area before approaching a distinctive entrance covered by a curtain of hanging green circular decorations. The camera moves through the beaded curtain into a darker interior space, transitioning from the bright outdoor market to an enclosed environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense industrial market, moving from hazy street-level stalls up to an elevated walkway before descending into a secluded interior. It begins at a steaming food stall with green stools, pushing forward through a narrow, scaffolding-lined alleyway filled with atmospheric haze. As the camera emerges into a sunlit street of shipping containers and pedestrian traffic, it ascends a set of metal stairs to an upper walkway characterized by grate flooring and a glowing cyan pharmaceuticals sign. The perspective then shifts downward, descending back to the ground level through a corridor of blue and orange containers topped with pink neon. Finally, the camera returns to the food stall area and passes through a curtain of hanging green circular decorations, transitioning from the bright outdoor bustle into a darker enclosed space.
